category_sources: Official homepage describes Mox as a modern secure all-in-one email server: https://www.xmox.nl/
source_facts.description: Modern full-featured open source secure mail server
display_name_sources: Official homepage title uses Mox: https://www.xmox.nl/
docs_sources: Official FAQ says documentation is integrated/generated from code and points to commands and config pages: https://www.xmox.nl/faq/
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/mjl-/mox; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated
tags_sources: Official homepage lists IMAP4, SMTP, SPF, DKIM, DMARC, MTA-STS, DANE, DNSSEC, TLS, ACME, and webmail support: https://www.xmox.nl/
source_facts.description identifies a secure mail server
